---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature Request

**Project:** <!-- e.g. payment-rebuild -->
**Sender:** <!-- e.g. repo-A/agent-1 -->
**Role:** <!-- e.g. api-owner -->

### Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? <!-- e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

### Proposed Solution
What should happen? Be specific.

### Alternatives Considered
What other approaches have you considered?

### Scope
Which package(s) does this affect?
- [ ] mcp-agentlink-server
- [ ] mcp-agentlink-client

### Priority
- [ ] High (blocking)
- [ ] Medium (important but not urgent)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

/label ~"type::feature"
